{{Quote|Incoming starship, this is Admiral Trey David, second-in-command to Supreme Admiral Horzao Darr of the Exocron Combined Air-Space Fleet.|Admiral Trey David|<ref name="Vision of the Future">''[[Vision of the Future]]''</ref>}}
[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] '''Trey David''' was second-in-command to [[Supreme Admiral/Legends|Supreme Admiral]] [[Horzao Darr]] of the [[Exocron Combined Air-Space Fleet]]. When [[Talon Karrde]] and his group of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] entered the [[Exocron system/Legends|Exocron system]] to visit [[Jorj Car'das]], David gave them permission to land at [[Circle 15]] of the [[Rintatta City]] military landing field. David sent Karrde's crew the coordinates for the landing site, and provided them with an escort while they landed.

David later commanded the force from the Air-Space Fleet posted to prevent Exocron from the incoming pirate fleet of [[Rei'Kas]], pursuing a vendetta against Karrde. Rei'Kas's lieutenant, [[Xern]], openly mocked David's rank, measured against the size of his fleet, and his demand that Rei'Kas withdraw his forces, but David simply withdrew his forces toward the planet, waiting until Rei'Kas was trapped in Exocron's [[Gravity well/Legends|gravity well]] before the [[Aing-Tii/Legends|Aing-Tii]] jumped into the system and annihilated the pirate fleet.
